items.q: Do your cleaners have experience in care environments?
items.a: Yes. Our cleaners for health and social care are trained to work in care homes, supported living, and healthcare facilities.

items.q: Can I hire cleaners on a temporary or emergency basis?
items.a: Absolutely. We offer cleaners for hire on a same-day, short-term, or long-term basis.
Yes. Every cleaner is DBS-checked and trained in safeguarding and infection control.

items.q: How quickly can I receive cleaning staff?
items.a: We provide same-day or next-day cleaners depending on availability and urgency.
